subject: fix(sancio): add missing signature log, notifications to new endpoints
body:
Review found 3 behavioral gaps vs existing endpoint patterns:

1. accept-handshake: now logs signature (handshake_signed) matching
   moduleReady/approveSequence patterns, and notifies the other party.

2. batch-ready: now sends a single aggregated notification after the
   batch completes, matching individual moduleReady behavior without
   sending N separate notifications.

Tags: api, sancio, review-fix
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: api
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: sancio-api-migration
Semver: patch

title: add missing signature log, notifications to new endpoints
